actions.action: Tap on the Add floating action button
Verify that the Add/Edit Mood screen opens
Verify that it is no longer dimmed
Type in the Notes text field a 7 word description of your day
tap the thumbs up for sleep and sunlight
tap the + to enter a new tag
type a new tag 'walk the dog' in the New tag field and tap Add
Verify that 'walk the dog' is visible in the dialog
verify that the tag was added to the entry on the main screen
Verify that the emojy for Today on the overview screen is 🤩
Tap on the History toolbar icon
Verify that the mood entry with 'walk the dog' tag is visible in history
